description: Save a falsifiable prediction, then record what reality did. Reality grades you, not the model.
name: io.github.commet/argus-decision-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Directory for the append-only ledger (.argus). Set once and every tool falls back to it. Claude Code expands ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}; on other hosts use an absolute path.
environmentVariables.name: ARGUS_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Optional Argus account token. Set it and saved predictions sync so Argus can email you at the check-by date. Unset = fully local, no network.
environmentVariables.name: ARGUS_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Timezone that decides when a check-by date becomes today (e.g. Asia/Seoul). Unset = your machine's local timezone.
environmentVariables.name: ARGUS_TZ
